reporting_unit: Filing reports in USD millions. All monetary values multiplied by 1,000,000 to convert to raw dollars. Shares reported in millions and multiplied by 1,000,000 to convert to raw count.

company_mapping.revenue: us-gaap:Revenues — Income statement line item labeled Revenue, directly maps to total revenue
company_mapping.cogs: us-gaap:CostOfRevenue — Income statement line item labeled Cost of revenue
company_mapping.gross_profit: us-gaap:GrossProfit — Income statement line item labeled Gross profit, equals Revenue minus Cost of revenue
company_mapping.operating_income: us-gaap:OperatingIncomeLoss — Income statement line item labeled Operating income
company_mapping.pretax_income: us-gaap:IncomeLossFromContinuingOperationsBeforeIncomeTaxesExtraordinaryItemsNoncontrollingInterest — Income statement line item labeled Income before income tax
company_mapping.income_tax_expense: us-gaap:IncomeTaxExpenseBenefit — Income statement line item labeled Income tax expense
company_mapping.net_income: us-gaap:NetIncomeLoss — Income statement and cash flow statement starting line, labeled Net income; no NCI separation, consolidated basis
company_mapping.interest_expense: us-gaap:InterestExpense — Income statement line item labeled Interest expense, reported as gross interest expense (64M for Q1 FY2025, 66M for Q1 FY2024); stored as negative per policy
company_mapping.sbc: us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensation — Cash flow statement addback labeled Stock-based compensation expense
company_mapping.dna: us-gaap:DepreciationDepletionAndAmortization — Cash flow statement addback labeled Depreciation and amortization; single line covering all D&A
company_mapping.diluted_shares: us-gaap:WeightedAverageNumberOfDilutedSharesOutstanding — Income statement line item labeled Diluted weighted average shares
company_mapping.cash: us-gaap:CashAndCashEquivalentsAtCarryingValue — Balance sheet line item labeled Cash and cash equivalents
company_mapping.short_term_investments: us-gaap:MarketableSecuritiesCurrent — Balance sheet line item labeled Marketable securities
company_mapping.accounts_receivable: us-gaap:AccountsReceivableNetCurrent — Balance sheet line item labeled Accounts receivable, net
company_mapping.inventory: us-gaap:InventoryNet — Balance sheet line item labeled Inventories
company_mapping.accounts_payable: us-gaap:AccountsPayableCurrent — Balance sheet line item labeled Accounts payable; reported as a standalone line, not combined with accruals
company_mapping.total_assets: us-gaap:Assets — Balance sheet line item labeled Total assets
company_mapping.equity: us-gaap:StockholdersEquity — Balance sheet line item labeled Total shareholders equity; no NCI present
company_mapping.short_term_debt: us-gaap:DebtCurrent — Balance sheet line item labeled Short-term debt (current portion of long-term debt per Note 11)
company_mapping.long_term_debt: us-gaap:LongTermDebtNoncurrent — Balance sheet line item labeled Long-term debt
company_mapping.operating_lease_liabilities: Current: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent from xbrl_not_on_statement (246M at Apr 28 2024, 228M at Jan 28 2024), embedded within AccruedLiabilitiesCurrent on balance sheet face. Non-current: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent from balance sheet (1,281M at Apr 28 2024, 1,119M at Jan 28 2024). Total = current + non-current. Cross-check: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiability from xbrl_not_on_statement = 1,527M at Apr 28 2024 (246+1281=1527, confirmed).
company_mapping.cfo: us-gaap:NetCashProvidedByUsedInOperatingActivities — Cash flow statement line item labeled Net cash provided by operating activities
company_mapping.capex: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireProductiveAssets — Cash flow investing line item labeled Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets; stored as negative per policy
company_mapping.acquisitions: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireBusinessesNetOfCashAcquired — Cash flow investing line item labeled Acquisitions, net of cash acquired; stored as negative per policy
company_mapping.rd_expense: us-gaap:ResearchAndDevelopmentExpense — Income statement line item labeled Research and development
company_mapping.interest_income: us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest — Income statement line item labeled Interest income
company_mapping.other_nonoperating_net: us-gaap:OtherNonoperatingIncomeExpense — Income statement line item labeled Other, net
company_mapping.total_other_income_expense_net: us-gaap:NonoperatingIncomeExpense — Income statement subtotal labeled Other income (expense), net
company_mapping.basic_shares: us-gaap:WeightedAverageNumberOfSharesOutstandingBasic — Income statement line item labeled Basic weighted average shares
company_mapping.dilutive_equity_awards: us-gaap:WeightedAverageNumberDilutedSharesOutstandingAdjustment — xbrl_not_on_statement, dilutive impact of outstanding equity awards
company_mapping.antidilutive_shares_excluded: us-gaap:AntidilutiveSecuritiesExcludedFromComputationOfEarningsPerShareAmount — xbrl_not_on_statement, equity awards excluded from diluted EPS
company_mapping.operating_lease_liabilities_noncurrent: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent — Balance sheet face line item labeled Long-term operating lease liabilities
company_mapping.operating_lease_payments_cash: us-gaap:OperatingLeasePayments — xbrl_not_on_statement, supplemental cash flow disclosure
company_mapping.total_debt_gross: us-gaap:LongTermDebt — xbrl_not_on_statement, Note 11 total net carrying amount before current/noncurrent split (9,710M)
company_mapping.total_deferred_revenue: us-gaap:ContractWithCustomerLiability — xbrl_not_on_statement, total deferred revenue balance
company_mapping.sbc_segment_reconciliation: Segment reconciliation All Other: Stock-based compensation expense line; confirms total SBC allocated to non-segment
company_mapping.cash_paid_for_interest: Not separately disclosed in this 10-Q supplemental section; approximate with income statement interest expense for Metric 21
